summary: Audience tape recorded with high‑end Sennheiser mics and cassette gear, but no performance details available
review: The sole review focuses on the recording setup – two Sennheiser MKH404 microphones fed into a Teac PC10 with Dolby B onto TDK C90 cassettes – indicating an audience capture rather than a soundboard source. No comments are made about the musical performance, setlist flow, or individual band members, so the show quality cannot be assessed from this data.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one neutral‑toned review describing recording equipment; no insight into musical performance, leading to a modest rating weighted toward the limited recording information.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Uses two Sennheiser MKH404 mics, Teac PC10 with Dolby B, recorded onto TDK SA C90 cassettes – decent gear for a balcony audience tape but no subjective sound quality comments.
